scripts.install:backend: cd BackEnd && npm install && npx prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate: cd BackEnd && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd BackEnd && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:init: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate:deploy && npm run pb:init
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && npm run db:init
scripts.setup:backend: npm run install:backend && npm run db:migrate
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.start: npm run db:up && npm run setup && concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
